branch_metadata.branch_rationale: System-R coefficient derivation / search-space audit; branch-blind algebraic test

description: Look-elsewhere control. Full enumeration of algebraic compositions of {alpha_xi, D_Omega, beta_pi, gamma, eps_sync2} times allowed topological multipliers, against three EXACT-tier targets (sin2_theta_W, BH_entropy_quarter, Einstein_gap_two_thirds). Reports observed-over-uniform-null hit rates and Bonferroni-corrected joint p-values.

joint_null_under_uniform_density.interpretation: Not significant under uniform-combinatorial null; the three EXACT hits are statistically expected from the enumeration size.
